paloma-cocktail.name: Paloma Cocktail
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Pour some kosher salt on a small plate. Rub half the outer rim of a highball glass with 1 grapefruit wedge; roll moistened rim of the glass in salt. Reserve wedge.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'Combine 60ml fresh grapefruit juice, 15ml fresh lime juice, and 7.5g simple syrup or 1 tsp. granulated sugar in salt-rimmed glass; stir until combined and sugar (if using) is dissolved.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Add 60ml mezcal or tequila and fill glass with ice; stir until chilled, 30 seconds.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Top with 60ml club soda, stir gently to combine, and garnish with the grapefruit wedge.'}

pan-grilled-zucchini-with-lemon-pepper.name: Pan-grilled Zucchini With Lemon Pepper
instructions: Whisk olive oil, lemon-pepper seasoning, and salt together in a large bowl. Add zucchini slices and toss until evenly coated.
Heat a grill pan over medium-high heat. Place zucchini slices on the grill and cook for 4 minutes without disturbing. Flip slices over and cook for 4 minutes more.

pan-roasted-scallops-with-roasted-sweet-.name: Pan-roasted Scallops With Roasted Sweet Potatoes

ingredients.prep: unpeeled, halved lengthwise, each half cut into 4 to 5 wedges

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Place potatoes on large rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle 2 tablespoons oil over; sprinkle with salt. Lightly grate fresh nutmeg over and toss to coat.

Roast potato wedges 10 minutes. Turn wedges. Continue roasting until wedges are tender, about 8 minutes longer. Increase heat to 232°C and roast until potatoes are browned in spots, about 10 minutes longer.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Sprinkle scallops with salt and pepper. Working in 2 batches, cook scallops until browned and just opaque in center, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer scallops to plate; tent with foil to keep warm. Add cider, cream, and lemon juice to skillet; simmer until reduced to 1/2 cup, scraping up browned bits, about 2 minutes. Whisk in butter. Season sauce to taste with salt and pepper. Stir in any juices from scallops.
Divide scallops among plates. Drizzle sauce over. Divide sweet potatoes among plates and serve.

panettone-with-thermomix-pequerecetas.name: Panettone With Thermomix

ingredients.item: La piel de una naranja (solo la parte coloreada)
100 g de mantequilla a temperatura ambiente, en trozos
250 g de pepitas de chocolate o una mezcla de frutas confitadas y pasas

instructions: Fold up 70 g of milk, 20 g of fresh yeast, 1 teaspoon of sugar and 130 g of force flour. Meg 15 seconds at 4. Remove the dough, form a ball and place it in a bowl covered with a cloth. Let them rest in a warm place until they double their volume (about 30 minutes).
Without washing the glass, add 100 g of sugar and an orange skin. 30 second pulse at 5-10 progressive velocity.

It incorporates into the glass the mother mass, 60 g of milk, 30 g of honey, the 2 eggs, 30 g of fresh yeast, 40 g of azahar water, 450 g of force flour and 1 / 2 teaspoon of salt. Mix 30 seconds at speed 6. Amasa for 3 minutes as an espiga function. With the machine in operation as an espiga function, add about 100 g of butter by the mouth. Keep kneeling for another two minutes.
Let rest the dough inside the glass, covered with a cloth, until its volume (1-2 hours, depending on room temperature).
Programme 1 minute with espiga and add the chocolate nipes or the mixture of confided fruit and passing through the mouth.

Fold the dough onto a pitted surface and divide it into two or three equal parts, depending on the size of your mold. It forms balls with each portion and puts them into paper mold for panettone. Let rest at a warm place till the mass stands out from the edge of the mold (1-2 hours).

It purifies the oven at 180-3-with heat up and down. Do a cross-cut at the surface of each panettone and place a piece of butter at the centre. Hornea for 40-45 minutes. If the surface gets too tipsy, cover with an aluminium paper.
Once baked, cross the panettle base with a long brush or needles and hold them face down till they completely cool.

parfait-cacao-wow.name: Parfait: Cacao Wow
instructions: Spread the yogurt evenly in the bottom of a trifle glass. Top with the nuts and seeds, fruit, maple syrup, and dark chocolate.
Enjoy!

parian-cook-argiro.name: Parian Cook

ingredients.item: 2 mash.fresh onions with their leaves chopped
2 mash.fresh onions with their leaves chopped

instructions: Clean the intestines first, turning them inside out with a pen or pencil.
Wash them and add them to a bowl.
Add 1 lemon for the parian cook and add some salt.
Leave them in the refrigerator for a few hours, until white. We can do this a day ago.
Then rinse them well and catch 2-3 intestines and knit them into thin braid.
Heat them for a few minutes in boiling water and drain them.
After cold, cut them with a knife into very small pieces.
Clean the liver and heat it in boiling water for a few minutes.
Drain and let it cool.
We chop it into very small pieces.
Cut the lettuces and heat them for 2-3 minutes in boiling water. We drain them.
In a pot heat the olive oil and add the onions.
Allow them to soften over medium heat for 6-8 minutes to become transparent.
Add the fresh onions, chopped liver and chopped intestines. Mix well.
Cover the ingredients with water and cover the pot. Allow to simmer for 25-30 minutes.
Then add the rice, lettuce, salt and pepper.
Simmer for 15 minutes. In the last boil add a lot of dill.

parsnip-and-carrot-chips.name: Parsnip And Carrot Chips

ingredients.item: Kosher salt or flaky or coarse sea salt

instructions: After peeling one of the carrots, use the vegetable peeler to peel away long strips from the whole length of the carrot, allowing the strips to drop into a large bowl. Turn the carrot in your hand about one-quarter turn after every 4 or 5 strips, so you'll generally have strips of similar width and length overall. Do the same with the remaining carrots and the parsnips, both of which have a tough core that should be discarded once you get there (the color tends to change slightly).
Pour about 2 inches of oil into a large heavy saucepan (the oil should not come more than halfway up the sides of the pan). Bring to 191°C over medium heat.
While the oil is heating, combine the salt and thyme in a small dish and rub them together between your fingers for a bit to release the aromatics of the thyme.

Carefully add a handful of the vegetable strips to the oil and fry until lightly browned and crisp, 1 to 2 minutes. Use the back of a slotted spoon to gently press the strips down into the oil and spread them out a bit to help ensure even cooking. When crisped, lift out the strips and scatter them on paper towels to drain. Repeat with the remaining vegetable strips, allowing the oil to reheat between batches as needed.
Transfer the chips to a serving bowl, sprinkle the thyme-salt mixture over them, and serve. They will be best served shortly after frying.

party-guacamole.name: Party Guacamole
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the avocado, tomato, red onion, jalapeño, lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix together until fully incorporated. Top with cilantro, if using.
Serve with tortilla chips.
Enjoy!

passion-fruit-bars.name: Passion Fruit Bars

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: preferably Ceres or Goya Passion Fruit Cocktail

ingredients.item: Fresh passion fruit or powdered sugar

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Line an 8x8" baking pan, preferably metal, with overlapping sheets of parchment paper, leaving generous overhang on all sides. Whisk flour, granulated sugar, salt, and baking powder in a large bowl to combine. Add butter and vanilla and mix with a rubber spatula until butter is evenly distributed. The dough should stick together in clumps while still remaining crumbly.

Transfer dough to prepared pan (you may find it easier to form into a ball first instead of working with clumps—entirely up to you) and press into pan in an even layer, working it all the way to the sides and corners.
Bake shortbread until top and edges are golden brown, 13–17 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.

While the shortbread is cooling, whisk flour, cream of tartar, and salt in a small bowl to combine. Vigorously whisk eggs, egg yolks, passion fruit juice, lemon juice, and granulated sugar in a large saucepan just to combine. Add dry ingredients and whisk to incorporate.

Set saucepan over medium heat and cook curd, whisking constantly and making sure to get into the corners of the pan, until it begins to release steam and thicken, 9–12 minutes. Immediately remove pan from heat, add butter, and whisk until smooth.

Pour hot curd through a fine-mesh sieve onto shortbread crust, using a rubber spatula to scrape off any curd that clings to the bottom of sieve. Spread curd into an even layer, working it all the way to the sides and corners. Tent a sheet of foil over baking dish to cover loosely and bake 12 minutes.

Reduce oven temperature to 325° and remove foil from pan. Continue to bake bar until sides of curd are set but center still jiggles slightly when pan is gently shaken, 8–10 minutes more. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let bar cool, about 1 hour. Cover pan tightly with plastic wrap and chill at least 3 hours before serving.

Just before serving, slice passion fruit bars into 2" squares and top with spoonfuls of fresh passion fruit or dust with powdered sugar with a fine-mesh sieve if desired.
Do ahead: Bars can be baked 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

passion-fruit-curd.name: Passion Fruit Curd
instructions:
Place 1½ cups (350 g) passion fruit pulp, 6 large eggs, 1 cup plus 2 Tbsp. (225 g) sugar, and 1⁄4 tsp. salt in a food processor fitted with the blade attachment. Pulse several times, stopping once it’s completely combined. Place the mixture in a small saucepan and set over medium low heat. Whisk constantly until it thickens significantly. Gradually lower the heat and be careful not to let it overheat. It will start to thicken at around 140° and fully thicken at around 167°, which takes 10–15 minutes at medium-low. Don’t go over 180°. Once the curd reaches the target temperature and consistency, remove from the heat and immediately add 6 Tbsp. (85 g) cold unsalted butter, cut into 4 pieces, whisking constantly until it disappears completely.
Do Ahead: Passion fruit curd will keep in the fridge for about 7 days, but it’s best stored in the freezer for up to 3 months.

pasta-with-hummus-argiro.name: Pasta With Hummus
instructions: In a pan heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the Thin Slices of onions and sauce for 4-5 minutes.
Add the garage and sauce for 1 minute.
Remove the garlic, add the baby spinach and sauce for 1 minute.
Lower the heat and add the humus and water where the pasta boiled, so that we have a liquid sauce.
With pasta water you can control the density of the sauce.
Boil the pasta in salted water.
Add the boiled pasta as they drip into the sauce.
Mix, add a little lemon zest and a few drops of lemon juice, bumblebee, salt and pepper.
Serve the warm creamy spaghetti with humus immediately.

patisserie-pita-lezzet.name: Patisserie Pita
instructions: 1. Take a cup of kneading container.
2. Mix water and warm milk in the same container.
3. Add and melt yeast.
4. Add and mix the yeast mixture by opening the midst pool.
5. Cover the remaining flour on 20 minutes.
6. Mix the dough by adding sugar, salt, mahlep, sunflower oil, melted butter and eggs.
7. Make the mixture thoroughly knead dough.
8. Cover over with damp cloth for 30 minutes.
9. Pressing the dough with hand to lubricated tray with 28 cm diameter.
10. Add sunflower oil to the egg yolk and mix it on the pidenine.
11. 11. Cook the sesame and cook until the oven with 180 degrees.
12. Serve by slice the area.

pea-puree-teleculinaria.name: Pea Puree
instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into pieces. Boil them with the peas in salty water.
Depois de tudo cozido, escorra e passe pelo passe-vite. Adicione as natas e coentros picados. Retifique o sal e tempere com pimenta. Sirva de seguida.

peach-cheesecake-recipe-comedera.name: Peach Cheesecake Recipe
instructions: With the help of a food processor or inside an airtight bag. Triple the cookies.
Debe quedar un polvo de galletas, sin grumos para que pueda compactarse sin problemas.
En el molde previamente cubierto con papel para hornear, agrega las galletas trituradas y la mantequilla derretida.
Mezcla bien, aplana y deja reposar durante 10 minutos.
In a small container add granetin and cold water. Swallow well, let rest till the granetin absorbs water, about 10 minutes and then get into the microwave for 15-20 seconds to melt.
In a bowl add the cream and cream to beat very cold and beat for 2 minutes or till sponge. Reserve.
Loan peaches in syrup to have a homogenous mixture and then add granetin and mix again for 1 more minute.
It incorporates a mixture of peaches into a mixture of cream cheese and stirres up with a homogenous mixture.
Vierte la mezcla en el molde y deja refrigerar
In a small bowl, mix water with granetin, stir and let rest for 10 minutes, then put into the microwave to completely melt the jelly.
Once liquid pour into the peach jam. It's good.
Cuando la parte superior del pay haya cuajado, vierte la mermelada y extiende.
Coloca las rebanadas de durazno.
Lleva al refrigerador durante 4 horas o durante toda la noche.
Desmolda y sirve.

peach-pecan-kale-salad-with-hot-honey-vi.name: Peach-pecan Kale Salad With Hot-honey Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep:
ribs and stems removed, leaves thinly
sliced

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast ½ cup pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 6–8 minutes. Let cool; coarsely chop.

Toss 2 large bunches Tuscan kale, ribs and stems removed, leaves thinly sliced, with 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large bowl to coat. Massage leaves until starting to soften, about 3 minutes. Let sit at room temperature at least 15 minutes and up to 2 hours.
Toss 1½ large ripe peaches, thinly sliced, with 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice in a small bowl to coat. Set aside.

Blend 3 Tbsp. Champagne vinegar, 2 tsp. hot honey, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper, remaining 1½ large ripe peaches, thinly sliced, and remaining 6 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a blender until smooth and emulsified.
Pour dressing over kale. Add pecans, 4 oz. Gouda, coarsely chopped, ½ cup torn mint leaves, and reserved peaches; toss to combine. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt and season with more pepper.

pear-and-blue-cheese-salad.name: Pear And Blue Cheese Salad
instructions: {'step': 'Place salad greens in a large bowl.'}
{'step': 'Add pear, red onion, pecans, and blue cheese; toss to combine.'}
{'step': 'Place mayonnaise, apple cider vinegar, maple syrup, brown sugar, salt, and pepper in a blender; blend thoroughly.'}
{'step': 'With the motor running, pour in walnut oil in a slow, steady stream.'}
{'step': 'Blend until dressing becomes creamy, about 1 minute.'}
{'step': 'Pour over salad; toss to coat evenly.'}
{'step': 'Serve immediately.'}

penne-with-eggplant-sauce-pumpkin-and-so.name: Penne With Eggplant Sauce, Pumpkin And Sour Cream
penne-with-eggplant-sauce-pumpkin-and-so.original_name: Πένες με σάλτσα μελιτζάνας, κολοκύθι και ξινομυζήθρα

ingredients.item: 1 dry onion cut into small frames
5 ripe tomatoes cut into small frames
1 dry onion cut into small frames
5 ripe tomatoes cut into small frames

instructions: We can fry vegetables in olive oil, but because they absorb a lot of oil it is better to bake them in the oven. Add the chopped eggplants and pumpkins to a baking pan, sprinkle them with some olive oil and bake them at 200.3.3. for 10.-15.
In a pot, heat the olive oil and place the onion in a low heat. Add the garlic whole and leave it for 2 minutes, to flavor the oil. Then remove it.
Add the chopped tomatoes and the grated tomato. Boil the tomato sauce on high heat for 5–6–1.
Add the cooked vegetables, salt, pepper and boil for 8 minutes-10 minutes the sauce, to combine the flavors. Towards the end of the boil, sprinkle with the fresh herbs.
Meanwhile, we've boiled the pasta in salted water. Drain and add them to the sauce as they drain. Mix well and allow for 1 minute to boil.
Remove from the heat and serve the pens immediately by sprinkles of feta cheese or sour-flavored Paros.
Garnish with chopped basil and mint.

peperonata-recipe-step-by-step-comedera.name: Peperonata Recipe Step By Step
peperonata-recipe-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Receta de peperonata paso a paso
instructions: Limpia los pimientos, retira las semillas y lava. Corta en tiras.
Pela los dientes de ajo y trocea.
Also pits onion and cuts into strips.
Pela los tomates y trocea muy bien.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil over medium heat, scattering onion and garlic teeth till tender.
Incorpora los pimientos, mezcla y cocina por 7 minutos hasta que se ablanden.
Add tomatoes, pint of sugar, salt and pepper. Mix, cover and cook with medium heat from 15 to 20 minutes till stew and vegetables are tender.
After that time, rectify with salt and pepper. When they're at their point, turn off and you'll be ready to enjoy.

pepita-pesto.name: Pepita Pesto
instructions: Combine parsley, pepitas, basil, lemon juice, water, and garlic salt in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until blended into a coarse meal. Pour olive oil in slowly and pulse a few times until pesto has come together.

peppermint-bark-brownies.name: Peppermint Bark Brownies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: about 1 cup; such as guittard extra dark chocolate
about 1 0.333 cups; such as guittard choc-au-lait

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat an 8x8" baking pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray; line with a sheet of parchment paper in each direction, leaving generous overhang on all sides. Whisk ½ cup (63 g) all-purpose flour, ⅓ cup (35 g) Dutch-process cocoa powder, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. baking soda in a medium bowl to combine; set aside. Whisk 3 large eggs, room temperature, and 2 tsp. vanilla extract in a measuring glass to combine; set aside.

Place ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, in a medium heatproof bowl; top with 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar and ¼ cup (packed; 50 g) dark brown sugar. Set over a medium saucepan of gently simmering water (bottom of bowl should not touch water) and heat, stirring occasionally, until melted and smooth (if butter starts to separate, whisk until it comes back together), about 4 minutes. Remove bowl from heat; reserve pan with water if you want to use it for making the white chocolate ganache. Add 6 oz. bittersweet chocolate chips (about 1 cup) and 1 tsp. instant espresso powder to butter mixture and let sit 30 seconds. Whisk until chocolate is melted. Add reserved egg mixture and whisk until no streaks remain. Sift in reserved dry ingredients and fold with a rubber spatula until just incorporated and no dry streaks remain. (Take care not to overmix as it will result in cakey brownies.)

Scrape batter into prepared pan and spread into an even layer. Bake brownie until the top is shiny (but not wet), slightly crackly, and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out mostly clean, 30–35 minutes, Transfer pan to a wire rack and let brownie cool in pan at least 15 minutes.

While the brownie is cooling, return reserved pan of water to a gentle simmer. Combine 8 oz. white chocolate chips (about 1⅓ cups), ¼ cup heavy cream, and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt in a medium heatproof bowl and set over pan (bottom of bowl should not touch water). Heat, stirring occasionally, until melted and smooth, about 6 minutes. (Alternatively, you can melt in 15-second bursts in the microwave, stirring after each burst.) Remove bowl from heat and whisk in ½ tsp. pure peppermint extract.

If the edges of the brownie puffed in the oven, use a spatula to press them down to create a level surface. Pour white chocolate ganache over brownie and spread into an even layer. Sprinkle with 3 candy canes, coarsely crushed into irregular pieces. Chill until ganache is set, 1½–2 hours (if you’re in a hurry, you can chill in the freezer 30 minutes instead).

To serve, lift brownie out of pan using parchment overhang and transfer to a cutting board. Using a chef’s knife, slice into a 4x4 grid to make 16 squares, running knife under hot water and wiping dry with a towel after each cut.
Do Ahead: Brownie can be made 3 days ahead. Leave in pan; cover and chill.

peruvian-lomo-saltado.name: Peruvian Lomo Saltado
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large pan over high heat. Add the steak, season with salt and pepper, and cook until browned, 5-6 minutes. Remove from the pan.

Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in the same pan, then add the red onion and cook for about 5 minutes, until softened and browned. Add the tomato, garlic, and aji amarillo paste, and cook for another 5-7 minutes, until the tomatoes have released some of their juices, but are still intact.
Add the soy sauce and vinegar and stir to combine, let cook for 1 minute.
Add the steak, fries, and cilantro. Toss gently to coat the fries in the sauce.
Serve with rice, if desired.
Enjoy!

pickled-corn.name: Pickled Corn

ingredients.prep: husked, cut crosswise into about 1 0.5" rounds

ingredients.item: Red chiles (such as jalapeño or fresno)
ingredients.prep: cut crosswise into thin rounds, seeded

instructions: Cook corn in a large pot of lightly salted boiling water until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a bowl of ice water. Let cool; drain.
Layer corn, garlic, chiles, and pepper-corns in a 4-qt. glass or ceramic jar.

Stir 5 1/2 Tbsp. salt and 2 quarts water in a large bowl until salt is dissolved. Pour over corn mixture. Place several plates or small bowls over vegetables to keep them submerged by at least 2". Cover jar with plastic wrap or a lid and let stand in a dark, cool place such as a cellar, closet, or pantry at room temperature (68°–70° is ideal) for 4 days to pickle; taste corn. Want more pucker? Let it sit for 1–2 more days, then serve or refrigerate for up to 3 weeks.

pickled-lemon-argiro.name: Pickled Lemon
instructions: The lemons are ideal for any recipe such as lamb with potatoes in the oven, white lemonade bean, ideal for marinades.
We choose fresh organic airtights, with a lot of aroma and thin skin.
Wash very well and dry them. In fact, what we're going to use after the recipes is lemon peel.
Cut each lemon along in quarters without dividing the quarters between them. They remain united the pieces of lemon at their base.
In a bowl, add the sugar and salt.
Add 1 tablespoon salt with sugar between each lemon.
We'll use a large jar sterile.
We make layers in the lemon jar, salt and sugar until the materials are finished
By putting the ingredients in the jar, press so that there is no gap between and the lemon juice starts to come out so that in the end the salt juice brine becomes sugar and covers all lemons.
Seal the jar and leave the lemon pickles for 1 week in a shaded cool cabinet.
Shake the jar every day.
After a week we'll see that the jar is half filled with lemon juice.
Then, fill freshly squeezed lemon juice to cover all lemons up.
Leave them in the cupboard for 3-4 weeks until they become pickles and use them.
When we are going to use lemon conceivables we remove from the jar with clean tool as many pieces as we want, rinse them very well for all the brine to go.
Remove the flesh and use the skin in recipes with fish, meat, chicken or where we want to give aroma.
Store in the refrigerator or in a cool spot for several months.
Lemon pickles are used as follows: whole pieces in grilled foods or very chopped their skins in marinades, sauces but even ground in paste form can be used.
You can give extra aromas to lemons with spices or herbs.
Try making Moroccan chicken tazin with lemon pickles.

pike-with-hot-sauce-lezzet.name: Pike With Hot Sauce
instructions: 1. Take the turna fish without deep.
2. Mix sunflower oil, lemon juice, fine chopped parsley and salt in a bowl.
3. Add pain sauce.
4. Pour all over the fish.
5.  30 dakika bekletin.
6. Cook the fish with the front back in the grill or coal fire that you thoroughly lubricate.
7. Serve hot.
8. You can also use different fish sauces instead of beer sauce.

pillowcase-cookies.name: Pillowcase Cookies
instructions: Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl until combined. Grate in cold butter; stir mixture together until it resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in beaten egg and yolk, milk, and vanilla until mixture begins to come together.
Transfer to a lightly floured work surface and knead until dough comes together, 3 to 5 kneads. Shape into a disk, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C); position an oven rack in the middle of the oven. Line 2 large, rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper.

Roll dough on a heavily floured surface to a thickness of 3/8 inch. Cut cookies with a 2 1/2-inch circle cutter, rerolling scraps as needed. Transfer to the prepared baking sheets, 1 inch apart. Freeze, uncovered, for 15 minutes.

Bake one tray at a time in the preheated oven until edges are golden brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Let cool on the pan for 2 minutes, then transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely, about 15 minutes. Repeat with the remaining tray. Store cookies in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 1 week.

pineapple-cream-filled-crepe-cake.name: Pineapple Cream-filled Crepe Cake
instructions: Add crepe ingredients to a blender in the following order: milk, orange juice, eggs, melted butter, vanilla, flour, sugar, orange zest, and salt. Blend until smooth, 15 to 20 seconds.
Refrigerate batter for at least 30 minutes, up to overnight.

Preheat a nonstick 8-inch pan over medium heat. Add 1/4 cup batter to the hot pan. Immediately move the pan from side to side to form batter into an even circle. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes per side. Remove to a plate and repeat to cook remaining crepes.
Whip cream and sugar for filling with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form. Add instant pudding mix and blend until well combined. Mix in drained pineapple.
Assemble cake by placing one crepe on a serving plate. Use a spoon to spread 1 tablespoon filling into a thin layer over the crepe. Continue layers with remaining crepes and filling.

pineapple-blackberry-and-basil-smoothie.name: Pineapple, Blackberry, And Basil Smoothie
instructions: In a blender, combine all the ingredients and process until smooth.

pink-snowball-cake-lezzet.name: Pink Snowball Cake
instructions: 1. Cake for a deep bowl of eggs with sugar thoroughly sugar.
2. After sugar is melted, add the oil of the month.
3. Add and mix flour, cocoa, baking powder and vanilla.
4. Bake the cake dough into a bark shaped caliba.
5. Bake for 25 minutes in oven with a heated amount of 160 degrees.
6. Cut out more than half of the cake and insert stre&ccedil by pressing a bowl coated with the film.
7. Heat 200 ml of cream from boiling point.
8. Take it from January and rub the white fr add and melt the ikolata.
9. I&ccedil cooling in the refrigerator;in wait.
10. &ccedil until the cold cream is rough.
11. 11. Add and mix your slices.
12. Transfer the health cream to the cake.
12. August Close the bowl &uuml with the remaining cake.
14.  Derin dondurucuda 30 dakika bekletin.
15. Cake from deep Freezer turn back.
16. Get from Stretch Film
17. September September Cream shy and cold milk with mixer frremove.
18. Cover the outer of the cake.
19. September Mix coconut with food paint.
20. Cream schizonin uniform sprinkle on the car.
21. Serve 1-2 hours in the refrigerator after covering the cake with coconut.

pistachio-baklava.name: Pistachio Baklava
instructions: For the Simple Syrup: In a small pot, combine 2 cups granulated sugar with 1 cup (240ml) water and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium, add the lemon juice, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sugar has dissolved and the syrup starts to thicken, about 6 minutes. Stir in the orange blossom syrup and set aside to cool to room temperature.

For the Pistachio Baklava: In a food processor, pulse pistachios until finely chopped; the pistachios should still have texture to them but not be too coarse. Remove 1/4 cup of the pistachios and set aside for garnishing the baklava.

Adjust oven rack to bottom position and preheat oven to 375ºF (190ºC). Using scissors or a pizza cutter, trim the phyllo dough to 9- by 13-inches (see notes). Place the phyllo pastry beneath a damp towel to prevent the dough from drying out while you construct the baklava.

To Assemble: Using a pastry brush, grease the bottom and sides of a 9- by 13-inch baking dish with butter. Lay 2 sheets of phyllo dough into the dish, then brush with melted butter. Repeat this step for every 2 sheets of pastry until you have 8 sheets of phyllo dough. Gently press down to ensure the layers stick to one another. Sprinkle crushed pistachios in an even layer on top of the phyllo, along with 2 tablespoons granulated sugar, leaving a 1/4-inch border around the edges. Continue to layer with the remaining phyllo, brushing every 2 sheets of pastry with butter.

Once you have buttered the last layer of pastry, use a sharp knife to portion the baklava into 24 squares. Pour the remaining butter over the top of the cut pastry (if the butter has solidified, re-melt it before pouring).

Transfer baklava to bottom rack of the oven and bake until the top just begins to brown, about 35 minutes (see notes). Remove baklava from the oven and run a sharp knife around the portioned squares to reinforce the previously made cuts. Pour the cooled simple syrup over the baklava. (How much syrup you choose to pour over the baklava will depend on personal preference; for a sweeter baklava, use all of the syrup.)

Top each piece of baklava with a sprinkle of the reserved pistachios. Allow the baklava to cool for at least 1 hour before covering or serving, though for the best flavor and texture it should rest for at least 4 hours and up to overnight before serving.

pomegranate-sorbet-parfait.name: Pomegranate Sorbet Parfait

ingredients.item: Labneh (lebanese strained yogurt) or plain whole-fat greek yogurt

instructions: Combine pomegranate juice, lime juice, sugar, and ½ cup water in a large bowl or measuring glass and stir to dissolve sugar. Process in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s directions. Transfer sorbet to an airtight container; cover and freeze until firm, at least 2 hours.

When ready to serve, scoop some sorbet into coupe or short glasses or small bowls and top with a spoonful of labneh, then some pistachios and black sesame seeds; drizzle with honey. Repeat layers once more to create a parfait.
Do Ahead: Sorbet can be made 2 weeks ahead. Keep frozen.

pork-fry-step-by-step-comedera.name: Pork Fry, Step By Step
pork-fry-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Fritada de chancho, paso a paso

ingredients.item: 2 kg de cerdo o chancho ((entre costillas y lomo))

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, sazonando la carne con el comino, la sal y la pimienta.
Take 5 garlic teeth and tricate them. Add them to the paddle, mix and leave to be marinated in the refrigerator for about 1 hour.
Now put your flesh into a pan, add water, onion, chalot, remaining garlic teeth, mix and cook for about an hour at medium heat. Just make sure it doesn't get dry.
After that time, it incorporates an orange juice, mixes and elevates the fire so that the pitcher takes up all the citrus and till all the fluids are reduced. Don't stop moving.
When you see that there's no more water, keep moving till your flesh's been well golden and a cracking crusts have been formed and looks juicy inside. Turn it off and serve.
Enjoy!

pork-loin-recipe-in-tejocote-sauce-comed.name: Pork Loin Recipe In Tejocote Sauce
pork-loin-recipe-in-tejocote-sauce-comed.original_name: Receta de lomo en cerdo en salsa de tejocote
instructions: Sazona el lomo de cerdo con sal, pimienta, ajo y cebolla.
In a large frying pan, heats olive oil with medium-high heat and seals pork back till it's golden everywhere.
It reduces fire and cooks with low heat for about 40 minutes, or until the back is cooked but still juicy.
For salsa, in a saucepan it combines knicote, sugar, water, cinnamon, cloves and pint of salt.
Cooking with medium heat till the knitted are soft and the mixture has been weighed about 30 minutes.
Retira la canela y los clavos de olor, y licua la mezcla hasta obtener una salsa suave. Agrega el jugo de naranja y mezclar bien.
Verte la salsa de tejocote sobre las rodajas de lomo y sirve caliente.

pork-shoulder-braised-with-apples.name: Pork Shoulder Braised With Apples

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: firm apples (such as Pink Lady or Honeycrisp), peeled, cut into 1/2-inch wedges (about 4 cups)

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 325°. Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add bacon and cook, stirring often, until browned and crisp, 6-8 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to a paper towel-lined plate and set aside.

Increase heat to medium-high. Add butter to pot with drippings. Season pork shoulder with salt and pepper. Working in batches if needed, cook pork shoulder, reducing heat as needed to prevent overbrowning, until brown on all sides, 8-10 minutes per batch. Transfer pork shoulder to a plate.
Add shallots to pot and cook, stirring often, until shallots begin to soften, about 4 minutes.

Remove pot from heat; add Calvados and stir, scraping up any browned bits from bottom of pot. Return to heat and simmer for 1 minute. Add apple cider and 2 tablespoons vinegar. Bring to a simmer, then return pork shoulder to pot, placing in a single layer on bottom of pot (the meat should not be completely covered).

Cover pot and transfer to oven. Braise pork shoulder, turning after 1 hour, until fork-tender, about 2 hours. Stir in reserved bacon. DO AHEAD: Bacon and pork shoulder can be cooked 2 days ahead. Let cool in braising liquid, uncovered. Chill, uncovered, until cold; cover and keep chilled. Rewarm before continuing.

Using tongs, transfer pork to a deep platter. Skim fat from cooking liquid. Place pot over medium heat and bring liquid to a simmer. Add apples and cook until apples are just tender and sauce is slightly reduced, 8-10 minutes.
Stir Dijon mustard into sauce; season with salt, pepper, and more vinegar, if desired. Pour sauce with apples over pork on platter. Sprinkle with chives.
Serve with Cheesy Grits (click for recipe)

pork-stew-comedera.name: Pork Stew

ingredients.item: 500 gr de cerdo picado en cubos medianos
2 cucharaditas de pasta de tomate concentrado

instructions: It pics very small onion, pepper, garlic and cilantro. If you have a dung with a knife, use a food processor / dung. Eye, the idea is to get them into small pieces, and don't get too bad and get purée. Not that.
A frying pan pits pork with an oil jet. Add ground comino, oregano, salt and pepper. Cooking for a few minutes till the pieces of meat are sealed all over.

At this moment you will add the onion, pepper, garlic and cilantro that you had minced earlier. Swallow well for a few minutes till I start to sweat a little. Add 1 cup of water and 2 tablespoons of tomato dough.
Sigue revolviendo y baja el fuego.
Prueba el caldo y corrige sal y pimenta de ser necesario.
Cover and let cook with low heat for more than 1 hour.
After this time, if the salsa's still very clear, clear the pot and put up the fire for a few minutes to reduce. Watch your step.

pork-wontons-with-sesame-sauce.name: Pork Wontons With Sesame Sauce

ingredients.item: . chinese toasted sesame paste or tahini
Store-bought or homemade chile crisp; plus more for serving

instructions: Using your hands, mix pork, scallion, soy paste, sesame oil, grapeseed oil, ginger, wine, salt, and pepper (if using) in a large bowl until thoroughly combined. Crack egg into center of mixture and stir vigorously in one direction with a wooden spoon or rubber spatula until mixture is shaggy and lightened in color, about 4 minutes. Cover and chill at least 15 minutes and up to 12 hours.

Fill a small bowl with cold water. Take a wonton wrapper and lay it in your palm. Using a small offset spatula or butter knife, press about 1 tsp. pork mixture into the center of wrapper. Dip a finger into water and run it around edges. Fold wrapper in half on a diagonal and press edges tightly together to seal. Dip your finger into water again and dampen 2 bottom corners of wonton. Bring corners together and pinch to seal. Place on a parchment-paper-lined baking sheet. Repeat with remaining wonton wrappers and filling. Cover and chill until ready to cook.

Do Ahead: Wontons can be assembled 1 day ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 1 month. Freeze in a single layer on baking sheet until frozen, then transfer to an airtight container. Cook from frozen, about 4 minutes.

Whisk oil, sesame paste, soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar in a small bowl to combine, then whisk in water, 1-tablespoonful at a time, until you can drizzle sauce easily but it’s not watery. If using chile crisp, stir in 1–3 Tbsp., depending on how spicy you want your sauce; set aside.

Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Working in batches of up to 10 at a time, boil wontons until wrappers are puckered and tightly wrapped around filling (filling should be cooked through; slice one open to double-check if unsure), about 3 minutes. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer to a plate; let cool slightly.
Divide wontons among bowls and spoon reserved sauce over; top with scallions and more chile crisp if desired.

pot-o-beans.name: Pot O’ Beans

ingredients.item: Dried black beans or pinto beans

instructions: Heat lard in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until edges are charred, 8–10 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook jalapeño in a small dry skillet over high heat, turning occasionally, until blackened, 8–10 minutes; cut a slit in jalapeño.

Add jalapeño, epazote sprig, if desired, and beans to pot; add water to cover by 2”. Simmer, partially covered, until beans are creamy, 2–3 hours (depending on freshness of beans). Season with salt and cook 15 minutes longer; discard epazote.

potato-and-carrot-and-pea-dish-recipe-le.name: Potato And Carrot And Pea Dish Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoon olive oil or liquid oil
2 mediums of potatoes (seeded and cube mixed)
2 medium carrots(eared and ring or cube wipe)
2–2.5 cups of water or vegetable suy u
1⁄2 tablespoon of powder sugar (imase the sweetness of the peasants, optional)
You can increase the visuals by spreading freshly accessible by dereotu or snacks.
You can combine both tastes and presentations by offering yoghurt or cacık on the side.
Tek tabakta pilavla birlikte servis ederek pratik bir ana yemek haline getirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Add oil to the pot and bite, roast the thin chopped onions until pink.
2. Add yellowms and hang short time.
3. Add Salç and add 1–2 minutes, then add vegetables.
4. Cube potato and carrot add them to the pot and a few minutes roast.
5. Add Peas and juice or vegetable water, add salt, pepper and optional sugar.
6. Close the cover of the pot, potatoes and carrot in jealous fire; cook 20–25 minutes until they soften.
7. Serve hot.
8. &Uuml can enrich the presentation by spreading fresh parsley to the car.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

potato-rolls-with-caraway-salt.name: Potato Rolls With Caraway Salt

ingredients.item: (1/2 stick) unsalted butter plus more for the bowl and pan

instructions: Place the potato in a small saucepan and add water to cover by 1". Bring to a boil; reduce heat to medium and simmer until potato is tender, about 15 minutes. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup cooking liquid in a small microwave-safe bowl.
Meanwhile, melt 4 Tbsp. butter in another small saucepan. Add milk; stir until warm, about 1 minute, and set aside.
Transfer cooked potato to a large bowl. Mash with a fork, then stir in milk mixture, 1 tbsp. sugar, and 1/2 tsp. salt (mixture will be slightly lumpy).

Rewarm potato cooking liquid in microwave (or let cool) until an instant-read thermometer registers 105°–110°. Stir in remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, and yeast; let stand until foamy, about 10 minutes. Add yeast mixture to potato mixture and stir to combine. Add 3 1/4 cups flour with a wooden spoon and stir until a sticky dough forms.

Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead, dusting surface, dough, and your hands often with remaining 1/2 cup flour to keep dough from sticking, until dough is smooth, elastic, and slightly sticky, 7–8 minutes. Form into a ball and transfer to a buttered bowl. Turn to coat dough with butter and cover bowl with plastic wrap. Let dough rise, chilled, overnight.

Butter baking pan. Mix caraway seeds and pretzel salt in a small bowl; set aside. Punch down dough (do not knead). Cut dough in half, then roll each piece into a 12”-long log. Cut each log into 12 equal pieces, then roll each piece into a ball (for 24 total). Arrange in pan, evenly spaced, in 6 rows of 4. Cover loosely with plastic wrap. Let rise in a warm, draft-free place until almost doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Arrange a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 375°. Whisk egg and cream in a small bowl; brush tops of rolls with some of egg wash. Sprinkle with caraway salt. Bake, rotating pan once, until rolls are cooked through and deep golden, 25–30 minutes. Transfer to wire rack and let cool in pan for 5 minutes, then run a sharp knife around edges to loosen from pan; do not separate rolls. Transfer to rack and let cool for 10 minutes. DO AHEAD: Can be made 8 hours ahead. Rewarm, wrapped in foil, in a 300° oven until heated through. Serve warm.

potato-soup.name: Potato Soup
instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with water; bring to a boil. Cook until fork-tender, about 10 minutes. Drain.
Place bacon in a large saucepan and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until crispy, about 8 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels. Pour out bacon grease.

Melt butter in the saucepan over medium heat, scraping the bottom of the pan with a flat-edged wooden spoon. Add celery, onion, carrots, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper; cook and stir until tender, about 10 minutes. Sprinkle in flour; cook and stir for 2 minutes.

Pour half-and-half and chicken broth into the saucepan. Add potatoes, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, thyme, cayenne pepper, and nutmeg. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently. Stir in bacon pieces. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring often, until flavors combine, about 10 minutes.
Ladle into serving bowls. Garnish with 1/2 teaspoon pepper, green onions, and paprika.

potato-soup-with-sour-cream.name: Potato Soup With Sour Cream
instructions: Set aside 4 potatoes; peel and cube the remaining potatoes.

Place cubed and whole potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until soft, about 20 minutes. Drain. Set the 4 whole potatoes aside; mash the rest.

At the same time, place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels. Crumble and set aside. Cut reserved whole potatoes into small cubes and set aside with bacon.

Heat flour in a large saucepan or pot over medium heat; slowly add milk, whisking until well blended. Add salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently, and cook for 8 to 10 minutes. Add mashed potatoes and stir well to combined. Remove soup from heat. Stir in 1 cup Cheddar cheese and mix until it melts completely. Stir in sour cream. Taste and adjust salt.
Serve warm topped with bacon, cubed potatoes, remaining Cheddar cheese, and green onions.

potted-chicken-rillettes.name: Potted Chicken Rillettes

ingredients.item: Chopped fresh thyme plus 4 large thyme sprigs
Crusty country bread slices or baguette slices

instructions: Combine 2 tablespoons oil, 2 tablespoons chopped thyme, and 2 chopped bay leaves in small bowl. Rub herb mixture all over chicken; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover and chill overnight.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large ovenproof pot over medium-high heat. Add chicken to pot and cook until browned on all sides, turning occasionally, about 10 minutes. Add carrot, celery, onion, and garlic; sauté until golden brown, about 7 minutes. Stir in 4 thyme sprigs and 2 whole bay leaves. Add wine and boil until almost evaporated, about 3 minutes. Add enough broth to come halfway up sides of chicken; bring to boil. Cover pot; place in oven and braise until chicken is tender, turning chicken once, about 1 hour.

Remove pot from oven; transfer chicken to bowl and cool slightly. Strain braising liquid into large saucepan. Boil until liquid is reduced to 2 1/2 cups, about 20 minutes. Remove skin and bones from chicken; shred chicken meat into bite-size pieces and reserve for chicken rillettes. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill chicken and braising liquid separately.

Melt 1/4 cup butter in heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add shallots and sauté until tender, about 4 minutes. Add remaining 3/4 cup butter to skillet and allow to melt. Stir in tarragon and thyme, then shredded chicken and reserved 2 1/2 cups braising liquid. Simmer until chicken is very moist and tender and liquid is slightly reduced but some liquid still remains, about 5 minutes. Season mixture to taste with salt and pepper. Cool slightly. Mix in parsley and chives.

Pack chicken rillettes into large glass jar or divide among smaller jars. Chill uncovered until cold, then seal jar and keep chilled. DO AHEAD Can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled. Bring to room temperature before serving.
Serve rillettes with crusty bread and pickles.

practical-eggplant-pastry-lezzet.name: Practical Eggplant Pastry
instructions: 1. Take half of the olive oil to a large pan and heat it.
2. Add and sauce the onions and freakliston peppers you’ve examined on it.
3. Add the tomato you've filled with the cube and continue to hang.
4. Heat the remaining olive oil in a separate pan.
5. Add and roast eggplants that you eat in the form of small cube.
6. Add salça and get from a few minutes more roasting.
7. Combining two mixtures and add a thin spark on it.
8. 10 square mummy oily paper is cool to the oven tray.
9. Place a softener from the edges.
10. tribute to you prepared is released.
11. 11. 11. 11. Close the Sarkan Yufka edges on the harc and slice after kneeing on the sack and yufka.
12. Discover the mineral water, olive oil and eggs on a separate container with the help of a cutlery.
12. August Pre-heated 180 degree bake 20-25 minutes.
14 July Serve by slice the area.

prawn-salad-argiro.name: Prawn Salad
instructions: For sea urchin salad there are special tools, scissors, for opening the sea urchin, but we can simply open it with a fork.
We need fresh sea urchins.
With a cloth we hold the sea urchin with one hand and with a fork pierce the shell around it.
We start working the fork like the opener a can around the sea urchin.
After removing the feta cap from the sea urchin, shake vigorously to remove any thorn or sand.
With a teaspoon, carefully remove the eggs of the sea urchin in a bowl.
When we clean them all, then squeeze a few drops of lemon and sprinkle a little olive oil.
Eat the clam salad with a spoon while enjoying its exquisite taste.
On the beach we use the sea urchin crabs for a bowl and collect its eggs and juices with bread. Great pleasure.
In our country fishing for sea urchin is only allowed for a certain period while catching by individuals is considered an offence with a heavy fine.

preparation-how-to-make-pizza-comedera.name: Preparation: How To Make Pizza
preparation-how-to-make-pizza-comedera.original_name: Preparación: Como hacer pizza casera fácil

ingredients.item: 1 / 2 can of tomato (or 4 large peeled tomatoes)

instructions: Dig tomatoes into a food processor or a blender. You can also crush them with a fork to get loose pieces. Add a pint of salt and oregano to this salsa.
Ralla el queso mozzarella.
It pics all other ingredients: ham, onion and pimenton in strips, and if you wear pepperoni or sausage, in very thin cuts, but they will have been selling them that way.
Armado de la pizza
Agrega la salsa de tomate sobre tu masa de pizza previamente preparada y lista en su respectivo molde. Esparce bien la salsa con ayuda de una cuchara para que quede uniforme en todos lados.
Then put his mozzarella cheese and then his other ingredients.
It leads to an oven, previously preheated at 200 degrees Celsius.
Deja cocinar por 10-15 minutos. Vigila que no se vaya a quemar, ya que algunos hornos son traicioneros.
The exact point of pizza is: melted and slightly golden cheese above and a slightly brown pizza mass under. It should be easier to break without being a cookie.

prepare-a-and-beef-ramen-comedera.name: Prepare A And Beef Ramen
prepare-a-and-beef-ramen-comedera.original_name: Prepara un ramen de res fácil y rápido

ingredients.item: 2  paquetes de ramen con sabor de carne de res
1/2 lb de carne de res cortadas en tiras
4 cdta de salsa de chile dulce

instructions: Let's start our recipe, warming up a frying pan with olive oil.
When it's hot, you'll add the rednecks and you'll leap to golden.
He will later add his meat and salt to his taste.
Cooking the meat for about four minutes or till the dente.
Now, you'll add his sweet chili sauce and finish cooking for 3 more minutes.
In a pot, you'll put two cups of water and start boiling. When at the boiling point, add the noodles, let them pass for two minutes and turn them off.
At this point, you're gonna sprinkle the raman sachets, mix and let them stand for 4 minutes for steam to finish cooking them.
Later, you will add salted meat with all the juices, mix and serve.
Enjoy!

prepare-a-delicious-shrimp-pate-step-by-.name: Prepare A Delicious Shrimp Pate Step By Step
prepare-a-delicious-shrimp-pate-step-by-.original_name: Prepara paso a paso un rico paté de camarón

ingredients.item: 250 gr de camarones crudos, pelados y desvenados
2 cdas de cebolla blanca finamente picada
1 cda de cilantro fresco o eneldo (al gusto)
1 cdita de brandy o vino blanco

instructions: Heat butter with olive oil in a frying pan with medium heat.
Soften onion and garlic until clear and fragrant, without overgolden.
Agregar los camarones y cocinar durante 3 a 4 minutos hasta que cambien de color.
Incorporar el brandy o vino blanco (opcional) y dejar evaporar el alcohol durante 1 minuto.
Retirar del fuego y dejar enfriar ligeramente.
place shrimp into a food processor with cream cheese, milk cream, juice and lemon frilling, mustard and smoked pimenton.
To process up to a homogenous and creamy mixture.
Adjust salt and pepper and add fresh herbs at the end to preserve their smell.
Refrigerar durante al menos 30 minutos antes de servir para mejorar la textura y el sabor.

preparing-rice-milk-comedera.name: Preparing Rice Milk
instructions: Lava bien el arroz con abundante agua.
Put them in a frying pan to toast with low heat till they start to glow slightly, be care, under no circumstances should the rice grains be burned.
Una vez dorado, por el arroz en una olla mediana y echa los 10 vasos de agua y una pizca de sal y un poquito de canela en polvo si se te antoja.
Pon a cocinar a fuego bajo durante 2 horas, revolviendo de vez en cuando.
After time, put all the contents into an electrical mixer and process them till a very fine texture cream is made. If you wish, this is the time to sweetens her with some natural bee honey.
After this, put the liquid through a paddle and put it into hermetics.

pretzel-crusted-chicken-nuggets.name: Pretzel Crusted Chicken Nuggets
instructions: Cut chicken breasts into 2 inch (5 cm) pieces.
Mix pretzels and cheese in food processor.
Add pepper to flour and mix in a separate bowl. Whisk eggs in another bowl, and pour cheese/pretzel mix in a third.
Bread chicken by first covering in flour, then dipping in egg, and finally coating in pretzel/ cheese mix.
Fry in vegetable oil. Flip several times until fully cooked.
Serve with ketchup or your favorite dipping sauce!
Enjoy!

pretzel-crusted-pork-schnitzel.name: Pretzel-crusted Pork Schnitzel

ingredients.item: Flat-leaf parsley leaves with tender stems and lemon wedges

instructions: Bring apple cider, brown sugar, and 1 Tbsp. kosher salt to a boil in a medium saucepan and cook until reduced by half, 10–15 minutes. Transfer to a shallow dish and let cool. Add pork, cover, and chill at least 6 hours.
Pulse pretzels in a food processor to coarse crumbs; transfer to a shallow bowl.

Whisk eggs, mustard, and 2 Tbsp. water in another shallow bowl. Place flour in a third shallow bowl. Remove pork from brine, pat dry, and season with kosher salt and pepper. Working one at a time, dredge in flour, shaking off excess. Dip into egg mixture, letting excess drip back into bowl, then coat with pretzel crumbs, pressing firmly to adhere.
Meanwhile, pour oil into a large skillet to a depth of ½” and heat over medium-high heat until it bubbles immediately when a pinch of flour is added.

Working in batches, fry pork until golden brown and cooked through, about 2 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels; season with sea salt. Serve schnitzel topped with parsley, with lemon wedges for squeezing over.
DO AHEAD: Pork can be brined 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

prime-rib-its-easier-than-you-think.name: Prime Rib - It's Easier Than You Think
instructions: Place roast, bone-side down, onto a rack set in a roasting pan.
Whisk olive oil, steak seasoning, garlic, Italian seasoning, and mustard powder together in a small bowl.
Spread over roast; set aside until roast comes to room temperature, about 45 minutes. Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the roast, not touching the bone. Reduce the oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Continue cooking until reaches desired degree of doneness, or an internal temperature of 63°C (65 degrees C) for medium is reached, about 1 1/2 to 2 hours. Remove from the oven, cover with a doubled sheet of aluminum foil, and set aside to rest in a warm area before slicing, 10 to 15 minutes.

protein-ice-cream-and-ice-cream-with-cot.name: Protein Ice Cream And Ice Cream With Cottage Cheese
protein-ice-cream-and-ice-cream-with-cot.original_name: Παγωτό πρωτεΐνης και παγωτίνια με cottage
instructions: Add the cottage cheese to the blender and add the honey, tahini and cocoa. Beat very well to homogenize and become velvety cream.
Add the bananas into pieces and mash for a few seconds.
Place the ice cream in a vessel that enters the freezer. Add chopped chocolate without sugar or chocolate drops.
Freeze for at least 2 hours until stabilized.
Before serving, leave for 10 minutes at room temperature.

protein-oats.name: Protein Oats
instructions: Combine oats and water in a heatproof bowl and microwave for 1 minute. Then, stir and microwave for another minute.
Add protein and stir well
Add seeds, banana and strawberries.
Serve.

protein-packed-vegan-pancakes.name: Protein-packed Vegan Pancakes
instructions: Combine ice cold water and vegan egg replacer in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until thick.

Stir together all-purpose flour, almond flour, flax seed meal, sugar, baking powder, and baking soda in a second bowl until well combined. Beat almond milk, 4 tablespoons vegan butter, and vanilla extract in a third bowl. Add flour mixture and almond milk mixture alternately to the vegan egg mixture, with blender set on medium speed.

Melt 1 tablespoon vegan butter in a skillet over medium heat. Pour 1/2 cup pancake batter into the pan; cook until bubbles form on the top and batter is set on the bottom, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip pancake and cook until light brown on the other side, about 2 minutes. Repeat with remaining batter, adding more vegan butter as necessary.

provencal-lamb.name: Provençal Lamb

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Note: you'll want to use a liquid—rather than a solid—honey for this recipe so it can be drizzled on the lamb.

instructions: Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.

Place the leg of lamb in a large roasting pan fat side up and pat it dry with paper towels. Combine the mustard, 1 tablespoon of garlic, the rosemary, balsamic vinegar, 1 tablespoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon of pepper in a mini food processor and pulse until the garlic and rosemary are minced. Spread the mixture on the lamb.

Place the tomatoes, olive oil, 1/4 cup of the honey, the onion, the remaining 1 tablespoons garlic, 2 tablespoons salt, and 2 teaspoons pepper in a bowl and toss well. Pour the tomato mixture around the lamb and tuck in the thyme and rosemary sprigs. Drizzle the lamb with the remaining 1/4 cup of honey.

Roast for 20 minutes. Turn the heat down to 350 degrees and roast for another 1 to 1 1/4 hours, until a meat thermometer registers 130 to 57°Cor medium-rare. Place the lamb on a cutting board, cover with aluminum foil, and allow to rest for 15 minutes. Discard the herb stems and return the tomatoes to the oven to keep warm. Slice the lamb, arrange on a platter, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and serve with the tomatoes and pan juices spooned on top.

puerto-rican-mofongo-recipe-comedera.name: Puerto Rican Mofongo Recipe
instructions: Cut the tocinet into small pieces.
Warm a pan or frying pan with some oil and fry the tocinet till it's crispy.
Withdraw the frying pan and reserve.
Take the onion and peppers and garlic. They cut into small notebooks and reserve.
In the same frying pan, purify garlic, onion and peppers until transparent. Withdraw and reserve.
Take the bananas, hair and cut into cubes.
Add more oil into the frying pan and fry the bananas till they get doradito from both sides.
Put the bananas into a bowl, and tighten them up as a purée. Then add onion, pepper and garlic, salt and onion to taste and crocant tocinet.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que quede todo integrado.
The mopongo will be ready to be used.

pumpkin-and-caramelized-onion-tart-lezze.name: Pumpkin And Caramelized Onion Tart
instructions: 1. thoroughly knead the necessary materials for dough in a deep container.
2. Add water according to the water.
3. Wrap the stretch film and listen to 20-25 minutes in the refrigerator, to obtain a non-stick dough.
4. Heat the olive oil in the pan.
5. Add the onion you eat in the form of half a month and hang it up to be caramelized in medium fire.
6. Peel the shells of the vest and chop the size of the backbone.
7. Add and mix sunflower oil, sugar and pepper on it.
8. Oiled paper release to the tray.
9. Pre-heated 180 degree cook in oven for 15 minutes.
10. Open the cake plate size with the help of the flour sprinkler on the dough.
11. 11. Add the roughness and onion you prepare for the middle.
12. Bring the edges right.
12. August Pre-heated 170 degree cook in oven for 15 minutes.
14 July Reindeed the baked cheese and sprinkle the oven again.
15. Cook until the cheese is melted.
16. Listen to the oven for 5 minutes and serve by slice.

pumpkin-cheesecake-swirl-bars.name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Swirl Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (160°C). Grease a 9 x 13-inch (22 x 33 cm) baking dish with nonstick spray. Place a 12-inch (30 cm) sheet of parchment paper in the baking dish crosswise to create a sling.
In a food processor, pulse the gingersnap cookies until finely ground. Add to a large bowl with the melted butter and mix to combine. The cookie crumbs should look like wet sand.
Transfer the cookie crumb mixture to the prepared baking dish and press against the bottom in an even layer. Place in the freezer while you make the filing.

In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar and beat with an electric hand mixer on medium speed until smooth. Add the eggs, 1 at a time, and continue beating until fully combined. Add the flour and mix until just incorporated.
Transfer 1 cup of the cheesecake batter to a small bowl and set aside.
To the remaining batter, add the pumpkin purée and pumpkin pie spice. Mix on medium speed until fully incorporated.
Pour the pumpkin batter over the chilled crust, then dollop the reserved cheesecake batter on top. Using a toothpick, swirl the plain batter into the pumpkin batter to create a marbled effect.

Bake for 35–40 minutes, or until the batter is just set and the center still jiggles slightly. Let cool at room temperature for 30 minutes, then transfer to the refrigerator to chill for 3 hours before serving.
Use the parchment paper to lift the bars from the baking dish, then cut into 12 pieces.
Enjoy!

pumpkin-ginger-scones.name: Pumpkin Ginger Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Mix together flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, ginger, cinnamon, pumpkin pie spice, salt, and nutmeg in a large bowl until well combined. Cut butter into flour mixture with a pastry blender or fork until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in raisins and pecans until incorporated.
Whisk together pumpkin, buttermilk, and vanilla in a small bowl. Stir into flour mixture with a wooden spoon, mixing just until dough comes together; do not overmix.

Transfer to a lightly floured surface and knead gently, 4 to 5 times; dough will be sticky. Pat into a circle, about 7 inches across and about 1 1/2 inches thick. Cut in half, then cut each half into 4 triangular wedges. Place scones onto the prepared baking sheet.
Make egg wash: Whisk together egg and milk in a small bowl until well combined. Brush over the tops of scones, then sprinkle heavily with coarse sugar.

Bake scones on the middle or top rack of the preheated oven until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center of a scone comes out clean, about 20 minutes. Slide scones, still on parchment paper, onto a counter or wire rack to cool.

While cooling, make icing: Combine powdered sugar, milk, molasses, ginger, and cinnamon in a small saucepan. Heat over medium-high heat and bring to a boil, about 5 minutes. Allow to cool partially for 3 to 5 minutes. Drizzle icing over scones; allow icing to harden before serving.

pumpkin-mashed-potatoes.name: Pumpkin Mashed Potatoes
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Cut potatoes into big chunks, leaving skins on.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Combine potatoes and 1 1/2 cups water in a stovetop pressure cooker.'}

{'step': '3', 'description': 'Close cooker securely and place pressure regulator over vent according to manufacturer\\u2019s instructions. Heat until steam escapes in a steady flow and makes a whistling sound, about 10 minutes. Adjust temperature until regulator is gently rocking. Cook for 10 minutes.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Let pressure release naturally according to manufacturer\\u2019s instructions, 5 to 10 minutes.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Unlock lid and remove.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Drain water and mash potatoes. Stir in margarine.'}
{'step': '7', 'description': 'Stir in pumpkin, salt, pumpkin pie spice, and basil until combined.'}

purple-mashed-potatoes.name: Purple Mashed Potatoes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Poke holes all over potatoes with a fork. Arrange in a baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until purple potatoes are easily pierced with a knife, about 45 minutes.

Cut purple potatoes in half, widthwise, on a cutting board. Scoop flesh into a mixing bowl. Add coconut milk, lime juice, salt, and pepper to taste. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Serve while still warm.
